tasks.title: Add delay between rendering double modals
tasks.description: On the testing page manage testing modal and finalize Mac or finalize win testing modals, there is the occurrence where the manage testing modal is open, then the finalize Mac testing modal is open, then it's closed and the manage testing modal is rerendered.  Currently it's a little flashy and there need to be some delay between fully closing the first modal then fully rendering the other modal.

App for deploying agent with Hermes, composio, orgo.  Could be desktop app, iOS/android app, do text, give assignment, check status, create central brain, create and store workflows.

Ai Chief of Staff: see above. $1k/mon 
Ai Accounting: check on accounts receiavable, do expenses, do reporting. $2K/mon

Do AI audit to kick things off with new client.

tasks.title: Fix database audit release blockers
tasks.description:
Change plan from DB audit. Jeff deferred item #2 (dev/prod Supabase separation) and accepted item #6 (auto-backup behavior) as-is for now.

1. Remove tracked secret/temp files: untrack app/.env and app/supabase/.temp/*, add ignore rules, and rotate Apple app-specific password if it was pushed.
2. Sanitize logs: remove emails, profile IDs, recipient emails, and raw query/error objects from client and Edge Function console logs.
3. Tighten SQLite IPC scoping: add userId/teamId scoping for delete-shared-jumps, log-click-name, and sync_state, or explicitly document any intentional global/team scope.
4. Whitelist SQLite migrations: replace addColumnIfMissing identifier string interpolation with fixed, hardcoded migration definitions.

Do not implement until Jeff approves.

tasks.title: Fix code quality audit release blockers

comments.author: Maximus
comments.html: Fixed code quality audit blockers: debug logging scan clean, no junk/select-star hits, hardened async/fetch/Supabase/UI paths, added bounds and escaping. npm test passes. Jeff to check.

tasks.title: Fix security audit findings (High + Mediums + Lows)
tasks.description: Implement all proposed security audit fixes across Electron, Edge Functions, and renderer.

comments.author: Maximus
comments.html: Implemented all security audit fixes: open-url scheme allow-list (High), pdfWin sandbox, CSP meta tag fallback, apply-pending-upgrade JWT email match, send-feedback length caps, preload homeDir removal. npm test passes 28/28. Jeff to check.
